title: Sky High
description: Survive the original 2011 Skyblock without the use of maps!
body:
![Title](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/4bPnng5r/images/1a32915cb497447313a6f0b39811f6ecbbe26fcd.png)

## 🌄 Information

---

This mod adds the original 2011 **Skyblock** inside of Minecraft without the use of custom maps!

****Here's how this works****, before creating a world you have to go in the **game-rules** menu, you can enable custom configurable options for the mod in there. For example turning on the **Skyblock Spawn** gamerule will make you spawn in the **Skyblock dimension (a dimension where the skyblock islands are generated in)** instead of the overworld!

![Skyblock](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/4bPnng5r/images/910223177f587d755f25abecb1cdb84c27d76ab0.gif)


## 🚪 Details

---

There are 5 different game-rules! Here are all of them:
- ### **Spawn Skyblock**
    - Instead of spawning in the overworld, you will be spawning in the **Skyblock dimension** on the **starter island!** (works only if the world is brand new)
![Starter Island](https://i.imgur.com/LGn72Dz.png)

- ### **Skyblock Spawn Desert Island**
    - Spawns the **Desert Island** in the **Skyblock dimension** (only if the dimension hasn't been loaded)
![Desert Island](https://i.imgur.com/pZmFuxr.png)

- ### **Skyblock Spawn Nether Island**
    - Spawns the **Nether Island** in the **Skyblock dimension** (only if the dimension hasn't been loaded)
![Nether Island](https://i.imgur.com/y6AuiLl.png)

- ### **Skyblock Spawn Cave Island**
    - Spawns the **Cave Island** in the **Skyblock dimension** (only if the dimension hasn't been loaded)
![Cave Island](https://i.imgur.com/pQEiQ2l.png)

- ### **Skyblock Spawn Snow Island**
    - Spawns the **Snow Island** in the **Skyblock dimension** (only if the dimension hasn't been loaded)
![Snow Island](https://i.imgur.com/DTIUI53.png)

**All of them are configurable using gamerules in the gamerules menu during world creation!
(I suggest you to modify them before creating a world or before entering the Skyblock dimension.
Trying to modify these will NOT WORK if you've already entered the skyblock dimension. The Skyblock Spawn gamerule will only work for worlds that haven't been created yet.**)
